provenance.source: Phase 1 PRD and PolicyEngine reconnaissance notes
provenance.notes: Candidate crosswalk only. Dangerous rows for income, unit composition, utility allowances, and BBCE require Dylan verification before fixture promotion or runner use.

rows.label: SNAP state

mappings.notes: PRD numeric state FIPS; use table.statemap for abbreviation/name.

rows.definition: State jurisdiction for SNAP parameters and state-option routing.

rows.label: SNAP unit size

mappings.notes: Computed from SPM unit size minus ineligible members.
PRD family size used in snapData join.

rows.definition: Number of people counted in the SNAP unit for benefit size and allotment.

rows.label: SNAP household member ages

mappings.notes: Adapter must place members deterministically into PRD fixed person slots.

sourceRefs: PRD function.snapBenefit elderly and kid count code
rows.definition: A deterministic ordered list of member ages used to determine elderly status, child status, and unit composition.

rows.label: SNAP elderly or disabled member present
rows.definition: Whether the SNAP unit includes an elderly or disabled member for gross-test, asset-test, medical, and shelter-deduction logic.

rows.label: SNAP earned income, monthly

mappings.notes: PolicyEngine annual input variables may need explicit monthly normalization in fixtures.
PRD code treats income as annual in SNAP calculations; adapter must normalize.

rows.definition: Earned income counted for SNAP before the earned-income deduction, represented in a fixture-normalized monthly unit.

rows.label: SNAP unearned income, monthly

mappings.ref: income.gift + income.child_support + income.investment + value.tanf + value.ssi + value.ssdi
mappings.notes: PRD aggregates these columns into income.gross.

rows.definition: Unearned income counted for SNAP gross income, represented in a fixture-normalized monthly unit.

rows.label: SNAP dependent care expense, monthly
rows.definition: Allowable dependent care expense used as a SNAP deduction.

rows.label: SNAP medical expense, monthly
rows.definition: Medical expense considered for SNAP excess medical deduction for elderly or disabled members.

rows.label: SNAP shelter expense, monthly
rows.definition: Rent, mortgage, or other non-utility shelter expense before excess shelter deduction.

rows.label: SNAP utility expense, monthly
rows.definition: Utility facts used to determine the SNAP utility allowance and shelter deduction.

rows.label: SNAP countable assets

mappings.notes: Adds bank account, stock, and bond assets.
PRD function uses totalassets in SNAP asset tests; adapter source column needs verification.

rows.definition: Resources counted against SNAP asset limits.

rows.label: BBCE gross income limit
rows.definition: State-specific broad-based categorical eligibility gross income threshold, expressed as a share of FPL or converted dollar threshold.

rows.label: SNAP eligibility

mappings.notes: Inferred initial comparator; unsafe for final classification without investigation because PRD direct function returns value only.

rows.definition: Whether the SNAP unit is eligible for a positive regular SNAP allotment in the comparison period.

rows.label: SNAP allotment

mappings.notes: PRD direct SNAP function returns annual snapValue; divide by 12 for monthly comparison.

rows.definition: Monthly SNAP benefit amount after eligibility, deductions, and expected contribution.
